name: Hunan Hot & Sour Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breasts, skinned, boned, and cut into bite-size pieces
1/2 cup fermented black beans, rinsed and drained
1 small green pepper, seeded and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine cornstarch, sherry, salt, and pepper. Add chicken and stir to coat. Cover and let stand for 15 minutes to marinate.
2. Prepare the cooking sauce by blending all ingredients in another bowl. Set aside.
3. Place a wok or wide frying pan over high heat. When hot, add 2 tablespoons of oil.
4. When the oil is hot, add garlic, ginger, and black beans. Stir once, then add chicken. Stir-fry until opaque (about 3 minutes). Remove chicken from the pan.
5. Add the remaining tablespoon of oil to the pan. When hot, add green pepper, carrot, and bamboo shoots. Stir-fry for 30 seconds.
6. Add water and stir-fry for 1 1/2 minutes. Return the chicken to the pan.
7. Stir in the cooking sauce, then pour it into the pan. Cook, stirring, until the sauce bubbles and thickens.
8. If desired, serve with a bowl of hot pepper and black bean sauce (recipe follows).
